title: sterculia rugosa
intro: Sterculia rugosa is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Sterculia rugosa include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including diarrhea, coughs, and skin irritations.
